label: strategy-classification
definition: Classification of a strategic approach or business strategy adopted by an entity

label: viability-prediction
definition: Forward-looking prediction about the viability or success of a technology or approach

label: actual-outcome
definition: Verified historical outcome that can be compared against predictions made at time of study

label: technology-assessment
definition: Technical evaluation of a product or platform's capabilities and characteristics

label: benchmark-result
definition: Quantitative performance metric or ROI measurement from research or vendor claims

label: framework-factor
definition: Structural factor or tradeoff shaping strategic decisions in the domain

label: market-data
definition: Quantitative or qualitative data about market size or conditions or pricing or adoption

label: expert-opinion
definition: Professional judgment or recommendation from a domain expert

label: high
definition: Strong evidence from primary sources or widely verified historical claims

label: medium
definition: Reasonable evidence but involves estimation or limited sourcing

label: low
definition: Speculative or weakly supported claim

label: company
definition: Corporation or business entity operating in technology markets

label: analyst-firm
definition: Technology research and advisory firm

label: consulting-firm
definition: Professional services and consulting organization

label: person
definition: Individual contributor or domain expert

label: retailer
definition: Retail business selling technology products to consumers

label: expert-opinion
definition: Observation derived from author's professional judgment or analyst recommendation

label: primary-source
definition: Directly stated in the source document as factual claim

label: vendor-claim
definition: Performance or capability claim originating from product vendor

label: industry-estimate
definition: Estimate or projection from industry sources cited in document

label: third-party-research
definition: Research findings cited from external organization

label: proprietary-research
definition: Research findings from author's own organization (Aberdeen Group)

label: historical-verification
definition: Post-hoc verification of claims against known historical outcomes

label: opinion-piece
definition: Expert commentary or editorial analysis published by analyst firm
